name: Handshake
desc: The very first packet sent by the client. Initiates the connection and requests a protocol state transition.
notes: Determines whether the connection enters STATUS or LOGIN state. Sent by GuiConnecting.java during server connection, Minecraft.java for local singleplayer, OldServerPinger.java for server list pinging, and RealmsConnect.java for Realms. The requestedState field is critical: value 1 enters STATUS (used by server pinger), value 2 enters LOGIN (used for actual gameplay).

modules.name: ServerCrasher
modules.purpose: Not commonly intercepted by modules — handled by vanilla NetHandlerHandshakeTCP.

modules.name: FakeConnections
modules.purpose: Not commonly intercepted by modules — handled by vanilla NetHandlerHandshakeTCP.
